subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou seest Thy servant Riḍá standing firm in Thy service and voicing Thy praise, and Thou knowest that in the beginning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی تری عبدک رضا قائما علی خدمتک و ناطقا بثنائک و تعلم بانه فی اول
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
